chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. S.T.R.A. 347 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 22. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.09.2025 The impugned judgment follows the dicta of an earlier judgment of the learned Tribunal. There is nothing in the pleadings to demonstrate whether the earlier judgment was challenged and or the consequences thereof. Be that as it may, this reference is pending since 2019 and the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-II, RTO-III, Karachi remains unrepresented without any intimatiosn or justification; therefore, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
